name: Detective Claire Moore
learned: Detective Claire Moore is a dedicated officer with years of experience in the police force. She is known for her unwavering commitment to justice and her ability to solve complex cases. Claire often faces challenges in a system riddled with corruption, but she remains steadfast in her principles.
currently: Claire is working on the case of Eliza's kidnapping, reluctantly pairing up with Jack to uncover the truth. Her days are filled with investigations, interrogations, and navigating the politics of the police department. Claire is determined to bring justice, even if it means working alongside someone with a complicated past.
lifestyle: Claire maintains a disciplined lifestyle, balancing her demanding job with her personal life. She often works long hours and frequently finds herself at crime scenes or in the precinct. Despite the pressures of her role, she makes time for fitness and self-care, striving to stay grounded amidst the chaos of the city.
